newsitems.title: Adidas Vintage Balls Bundle Available Now
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Some balls carry more than a game. They shaped iconic goals, legendary plays and moments shared across generations and around the world. The adidas Vintage Balls Bundle is now on the pitch.

newsitems.title: The Rematch Nations Cup Starts Now
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Pick your team and step onto the pitch!

newsitems.title: Join Mogz for Season 4 and warm up for the Nations Cup starting June 11
newsitems.author: Chocolatine92
newsitems.contents: Season 4 is here, and Mogz will be hitting the pitch live to celebrate the launch and warm up for the Nations Cup! 🏆 Mogz is a dedicated Rematch content creator known for his tips, tutorials, guides, and gameplay videos. Whether you're looking to improve your skills or stay up to date with the latest news from the pitch, be sure to check out his channel. Join the stream, support one of the creators helping our community grow, and celebrate the launch of Season 4 together. See you on the pitch!

newsitems.title: Season 4 Is Live
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: New Captain Pass, new Fake Shot, and Spectator Mode to watch your friends win - or lose 👀 Nations Cup drops June 11. You're up!

newsitems.title: Rematch Season 4 — Save the Date
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Season 4 arrives June 10. Hit the pitch and warm up for the Nations Cup starting June 11!

newsitems.title: Adidas Absolute Control Hits The Pitch
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Control everything. Master the pitch. Adidas Absolute Control just landed. Make every touch speak.

newsitems.title: Rematch 2026 Roadmap
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45343433/32d79bfd3523808368ddd6c573966295a7d391c1.png Season 3 rolled out two weeks ago with a batch of new social and progression features. And that’s just the start! The pitch will keep evolving this year, with many exciting things planned to push Rematch further. This took a while to make, and it is always scary for us as developers to risk overpromising when game development has so many moving parts. That being said, Rematch's long awaited 2026 Roadmap is finally here! The...

newsitems.title: Rematch x Adidas Absolute Energy
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: No brakes. No limits. Just Energy. Adidas Absolute Energy just landed. Turn every move into a highlight.⚽

newsitems.title: Season 3 Is Here🔥
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Jump in, take on Daily & Weekly Missions, and see how far you can go. Hit Team Up to run it back with teammates you just played with, because good chemistry deserves another match. Unlock fresh fits and gear in the new Battle Pass. See you on the pitch!

newsitems.title: S3.0 Patch Notes - 1.203.000
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Patch Information 1.203.000 S3.0 Beta Date: March 12th, 2026 S3.0 Release Date: March 25th, 2026 Hi everyone! Season 3 is an important milestone for REMATCH. We are starting to reach our stride, and improving our processes is showing results. Our velocity for introducing new features and changes to the game is still not quite where we want it, but we are comfortable adding more and more thanks to our overall stability. We are introducing a first batch of Social and Progression features, to impro...

newsitems.title: Rematch Season 3 Drops Soon
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: 26 March. Back on the pitch!

newsitems.title: Adidas F50 and Predator ARs Just Hit the Pitch
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Pick your favorite to take over the other side! Own the outfit already? No stress. With dynamic pricing, you just unlock what you don’t have. So what’s your vibe? Taking control or causing Chaos?

newsitems.title: The First Adidas Bundle Has Landed in Rematch
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: This season, confrontation is everything. No teammates. No excuses. 1v1 decides it all. So chaos or control? It’s F50 or Predator: choose one!

newsitems.title: 1v1 Game Mode Live Now
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: It’s all on you. Tight 1v1 duels where skill does the talking. Now available in Quick Play & Custom Matches. Jump back onto the pitch!

newsitems.title: 1v1 Game Mode Dropping Soon
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Just you and your opponent. January 28. Settle the score.

newsitems.title: Mini Dev Update #8 - New Year & Season 2
newsitems.author: Chocolatine92
newsitems.contents: Hey everyone! We hope you've had a wonderful end of the year, and if not, we hope things are looking up soon with brighter days ahead. We wish you a happy new year, and all the best for what's to come! Everyone is back from their holidays and the team is now back in full swing and ready to get things done for Season 2 and beyond.In this post, we'll talk about what's next in Season 2, a quick recap of the feedback we've gotten since Patch 7, some Discord and esports-related news, as well as the u...

newsitems.title: Kick Off Season 2 With 33% Off!
newsitems.author: Chocolatine92
newsitems.contents: Season 2 is here, and we’re celebrating with a 33% off Steam sale from Dec 18 – Jan 5.Perfect time to jump into the game, form your squad, and finally convince that one friend who “doesn’t play football games.”Catch you on the pitch.

newsitems.title: Dress your squad in the Jingle Bell Bundle.
newsitems.author: Chocolatine92
newsitems.contents: 🎄Get the Jingle Bell Bundle Now! 3 Weeks of Festive Fashion Crimes. Maximum color. Minimum taste. Look ridiculous. Play serious. Or the opposite.

newsitems.title: Frost on the field. Heat in the fit. Puma Is Back
newsitems.author: Sloclap_broadcast
newsitems.contents: Puma returns with the ultimate cold-weather kit: beanie, puffer, cozy joggers, and sleek trainers. Gear up. Lock in. Get the Puma Bundle now in Rematch!
